description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in phpx 3.5.15 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) image_id or (2) cat_id parameter to (a) gallery.php; the (3) news_id parameter to (b) news.php or (c) print.php; (4) the news_cat_id parameter to news.php; the (5) cat_id, (6) topic_id, or (7) post_id parameter to (d) forums.php; or (8) the user_id parameter to (e) users.php.
